name: Zombies In Valkeala
short_description: Third person shooter game, where player controls woman character whose mission is to kill zombies in place called Valkeala in 4 different locations
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player controls woman character in this third person low poly shooter. Player character is called Lara and She is only who can defeat zombie armies in place called Valkeala. Valkeala is separated 4 different small open world maps, which are full of different zombies. 4 different zombie types. Player Lara can use melee knife to beat zombies or then 2 different weapons: Pistol and Rifle. Player can also collect more ammos and pineapples to get more health

FEATURES:

  • 4 different locations

  • Different zombies:

  •   - Normal Zombie – just idle and walk slowly

  • - Pitchfork Zombie – More aggressive, equipped with a pitchfork.

  •  - Beehive Zombie – Leaves behind a lingering damage area even after death.

  • - Axe Zombie – Moves faster, dealing higher damage.

  • 2 different weapons: Pistol, Rifle

  • Melee knife attack

  • Steam achievements. Collect Steam achievements by playing enough long at different maps

CONTROLS:

Aim = Right mouse button

Jump= Space bar

Interact with items = E

Equip pistol = 2

Equip rifle = 1

Unarmed = 3

Reload = R

Roll = Left ctrl

Melee attack = V

Special jump kick= Q
